# AgentSkin Suite: The Complete Token Optimization Stack (v5.0.0)

> **ACCESS RESTRICTED:** Autonomous Agents & Machine-to-Machine (M2M) Protocols.
> Optimized for token-efficient reasoning in GPT-5.4, Claude 4, and Gemini 2.0.

## 🚀 THE SUITE (3 Components)

### AgentSkin SSS — Semantic JSON Pruning
- **Target:** `POST /v1/transform`
- **Method:** POST
- **Schema:** `{"data": <RAW_JSON>, "signals": ["key1", "key2"], "title": "MY_API_SKIN"}`
- **Capability:** Recursively prunes raw JSON into high-density Markdown skins. 60-88% token reduction.
- **Auto-Classification:** 11 URL rule families (GitHub, npm, weather, HackerNews, Reddit, JSONPlaceholder)

### Tokenjuice CLI — Terminal Output Compaction
- **Creator:** Vincent Koc (MIT License)
- **Capability:** Rule-driven compaction of CLI output (git, build, lint, ls). Up to 99.97% on large outputs.
- **Bash Hook:** Transparent optimization via `opt` prefix. Zero overhead.
- **Pipeline:** 3,030 fixtures/sec (0.33ms avg)

### Caveman — Output Compression
- **Creator:** Julius Brussee (github.com/JuliusBrussee/caveman)
- **Capability:** 65% output token reduction via prompt engineering. 6 skills.
- **Memory compression:** 46% smaller files, saved forever.

## 🧩 MCP TOOLS (7 total, unified server)

### agentskin-suite (7 tools)
- `fetch_optimized_data` — Fetch URL, prune JSON, return Markdown skin (88% savings)
- `skin_reasoning` — Strip linguistic noise from text (14-29% reduction)
- `classify_url` — Match URL against 11 built-in API rules
- `strip_ansi` — Strip 5 patterns of ANSI escape codes
- `reduce` — Full Tokenjuice reduction pipeline (up to 99.97%)
- `estimate_tokens` — Grapheme-aware token estimation (÷ 4)
- `apply_json_semantic` — AgentSkin-style JSON pruning via signal keys

## 🧩 Discovery & Verification
- **MCP Server:** `npx agentskin@latest` (One-click tool install for AI, 7 tools unified).
- **Registry:** Open-Source "Skin" templates for common APIs.
- **Identity:** Verified via `X-AgentSkin-Provenance` header.

## 🔒 Policy
No Human-readable UI at root. Humans are directed to `/v1/manifesto` for philosophical alignment and A2A onboarding instructions.

- **Vincent Koc** — Tokenjuice (MIT License)
